command.command_line: $ref=(Get-Content -Raw REFERENCE_BINARY.txt).Trim(); $cwd=(Resolve-Path rust-reference).Path; function Cap($file,$args){$psi=[Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo]::new();$psi.FileName=$file;foreach($a in $args){[void]$psi.ArgumentList.Add($a)};$psi.WorkingDirectory=$cwd;$psi.RedirectStandardOutput=$true;$psi.RedirectStandardError=$true;$psi.UseShellExecute=$false;$psi.StandardOutputEncoding=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8;$psi.StandardErrorEncoding=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8;$p=[Diagnostics.Process]::Start($psi);$o=$p.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd();$e=$p.StandardError.ReadToEnd();$p.WaitForExit();[pscustomobject]@{Code=$p.ExitCode;Out=$o;Err=$e}}; foreach($args in @(@('tests/itest','--icons=always'),@('tests/itest','--tree','--level','2'))){$r=Cap $ref $args;$p=Cap 'python' (@('..\executable')+$args); $case=$args -join ' '; "CASE $case same=$($r.Code -eq $p.Code -and $r.Out -eq $p.Out -and $r.Err -eq $p.Err) ref=$($r.Out.Length) py=$($p.Out.Length)"; if($r.Out -ne $p.Out){'REF:';($r.Out -split "`r?`n"|Select-Object -First 12)-join '|';'PY:';($p.Out -split "`r?`n"|Select-Object -First 12)-join '|'}}
